title: Add support for environment variable secrets
body:
Env var secrets are env vars that are set inside the container but not
commited to and image. Also support reading from env var when creating a
secret.

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10106

-->

comments.body:
Does this handle

podman run --secret mysecret,type=mount or --secret mysecret,type=env?

> Does this handle
> 
> podman run --secret mysecret,type=mount or --secret mysecret,type=env?

Both, I added tests for both as well
